feed.title: 9GAG
feed.subtitle: Hot posts from 9gag.com (no native feed; parsed from the page's window._config JSON). NSFW posts are tagged [NSFW].

entry.title: The Jackass: Best and Last drone show delivered exactly the kind of chaos you hope for.
Years pass. Friendships remain. The chaos stays exactly the same.
Straight to jail
Aberfan disaster
When You Can't Decide Who to Be Today
Guys hear me out..
We need to go back
Ok this is hilarious - I’m dying
Only people that has experience with Electrical engineering will understand the codes from those circuit boards.
Wanna Cry?
Meanwhile in Japan. In 5 minutes we begin the next match for Argentina
No no, this is my parking spot !
Pull a sneaky...
No way
The diversity I approve
You don't care for football
Owner of AC in europe
Ahh good old days lol.
Brawl in stands at the last Mexico game
Marriage makes man happy
Train Pepsi
Catch ....
Some years later
Based AF
We don’t deserve animals
Beautiful scenery in Russia tonihgt, as Ukraine hit two refineries throughout the night

Zelensky confirmed Ukrainian long-range strikes hit two Russian refineries overnight on Constitution Day: the Slavyansk refinery in Krasnodar region, about 300 km from the front, and a refinery in Yaroslavl region, roughly 700 km from Ukraine’s border.
WNBA
Lol in the middle of a heatwave
She was pointing at me!

Neymar would have been in prison if his laptop wasn’t accidently recording! Neymar Jr. was falsely accused of r*pe by Brazilian model Najila Trindade. What ultimately saved him, was his laptop accidently recording the ‘r*pe’, clearing him from every accusation.
"Shrekking"
How do I placebo myself?
This is a core memory for me
It is art
Convincing myself to make a bad decision
Finally a new business idea
(Punch the ground) It should have been me, not him!
Your best romantic / flirting memes in the comments. 👇
"Typo"

An infuriating book has arrived in our house, called 20,000 Cows. It's a wordsearch, but the only word to find is COW. Sounds easy? This is page 1, where there is one cow to be found, if you fancy a try.
I can imagine many a 9gagger pulling an Uno Reverse in the situation...
Asians need to step up

Someone´s gonna get arrested

Good movie!

The Last Video I have from my cat. He left on saturday and we never found him again. He was 17 years old.. probably Chose to Go on His final adventure. I Just Wish I knew for certain
